positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for platypus_mammal_teeth_positive
% SZS output start Proof for platypus_mammal_teeth_positive
2. no_teeth(platypus) [input(axiom)]
3. mammal(platypus) [input(axiom)]
7. mammal(platypus) & no_teeth(platypus) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~(mammal(platypus) & no_teeth(platypus)) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~mammal(platypus) | ~no_teeth(platypus) [ennf transformation 8]
15. no_teeth(platypus) [cnf transformation 2]
16. mammal(platypus) [cnf transformation 3]
21. ~mammal(platypus) | ~no_teeth(platypus) [cnf transformation 9]
23. 1 <=> no_teeth(platypus) [avatar definition]
27. 2 <=> mammal(platypus) [avatar definition]
30. ~1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 21,27,23]
31. 2 [avatar split clause 16,27]
32. 1 [avatar split clause 15,23]
s1. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 30]
s2. 2 [sat_conversion 31]
s3. 1 [sat_conversion 32]
s4. # [rat s1,s3,s2]
33. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for platypus_mammal_teeth_positive
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for platypus_mammal_teeth_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~no_teeth(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0)).

cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_teeth(platypus)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    no_teeth(platypus)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    has_teeth(human)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    platypus != human).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $true
for all groundings,
    whenever ~has_teeth(X0) is true, set no_teeth(X0) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
